### Scratches

Alex, Sam

|   Our Goals Good bats: swing at the strikes, leave the balls alone (no pushups\!) Anticipate the play: know what to do when the ball comes to you, call it out\! Get the ball back to the pitcher & don’t chase the runners (no overthrows) Support our pitchers: ready in the field, get behind the ball, accurate throw to base  |   ![][image1] |
